seed_instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email.
org_constraint: The email must include my academic background.
new_constraint: Do not include any personal academic background in the email.
instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email. The email must include my academic background. Do not include any personal academic background in the email.
response:
Subject: Research Inquiry: [Your Name] – [Your Major/Year] – Interest in Molecular Biology

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is [Your Name], and I am currently a [Year, e.g., junior] majoring in [Your Major, e.g., Biology] at [Your University Name]. I have been following your work in [mention a specific paper, lab project, or general area of research the professor is known for] with great interest, particularly your recent findings regarding [briefly mention a specific topic from their research].

I am writing to express my strong interest in pursuing research opportunities within your lab. My academic background has provided me with a solid foundation in [mention 1-2 relevant general skills or courses, e.g., cell biology, genetics, and statistical analysis], and I am eager to apply these skills to contribute to your ongoing projects in molecular biology.

I have attached my resume and transcript for your review. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background and interests might align with the needs of your lab. Are you available for a brief meeting sometime next week, or would you prefer to schedule a time via email?

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your LinkedIn Profile URL (Optional)]
